julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant neon pink to embody the digital, neon-lit aesthetics of the cyberpunk world. The stark contrast between the neon pink and solid black highlights the 1-bit high-contrast nature of the portrait, making it a striking piece for the mosaic. Placed at the origin (0, 0) as it is the first true portrait block, serving as the central anchor for the growing mosaic grid.
storyPanel: Echo-7 was once a low-level data runner, but after a risky wetware upgrade, she became something more. Now, she navigates the neon-drenched datastreams of Neo-Kyoto, a ghostly silhouette leaving only traces of electric pink in her wake.
